otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for tourism or short-term business for up to 90 days
British nationals are exempt from the K-ETA until 31 December 2026; after that a K-ETA may be required before travel
You must have an onward or return ticket; working while visiting visa-free is not permitted
sourceNote: gov.uk South Korea travel advice — visa-free for up to 90 days; K-ETA exemption for British nationals until 31 December 2026 (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/south-korea/entry-requirements)
